name: h7_X_pericentric_proximal
description: Drosophila pericentric heterochromatin sub-block: h7 — X pericentric proximal, AAGAG-enriched. Catalogued from Hoskins 2015 heterochromatin sequence release. Mix of simple satellites, middle-repetitive sequences (Dm88, BoBo, Bari) and ~250 protein-coding genes embedded in the heterochromatin (the so-called 'heterochromatic genes').
expected_copy_count: satellite copies 10^3-10^5; protein-coding genes 0-20 per block
